subject: New Assignment: Software Engineer – Gaming
body:
Hi there,

I wanted to share an exciting opportunity that just came in from FrostByte Games, a company in the gaming space.

They are scaling their engineering team and are looking for a Software Engineer to join on a contract basis.

What they're looking for:
• TypeScript
• GCP
• BigQuery
• Kafka

Practical details:
• Start: ASAP
• Duration: 6 months
• Location: Stockholm (on-site)
• Rate: up to 900 SEK/h

If this sounds like a fit, or you know someone who might be – reach out!

Best regards,
Ida Fredriksson
Account Manager
PeakRecruit
Tel: +46 73 566 78 90
